items.title: Taman Cerita: Interactive Multi-Ending Web Novel Platform
items.shortDescription: Interactive universe-based web novel platform featuring branching narratives, multi-ending choice mechanics, and transparent ethical monetization.
items.description: Taman Cerita is a premium Indonesian interactive fiction platform that combines serialized web novels with visual novel choice mechanics. Designed with an advanced "universe-based" shared storytelling hierarchy, it allows readers to determine narrative paths leading to distinct alternative or secret endings. Engineered as a mobile-first PWA with Next.js App Router for server-side progress persistence and static chapter generation, backed by Supabase for PostgreSQL, auth, real-time database functions, and integrated with Midtrans Snap for secure local e-wallet transactions.
items.result: MVP platform built with a fully integrated lightweight story CMS, Postgres schemas supporting cross-universe narrative resonance, and anonymous reader onboarding flows.

items.title: Raja Gacor: No. 1 Bird Song Training & Competition App
items.shortDescription: Indonesia's #1 bird song training and competition discovery platform, featuring advanced audio management, geo-location event tracking, and seamless hybrid monetization.
items.description:
A highly-optimized native Android application built with Flutter, tailored for the vibrant bird-hobbyist community in Indonesia. The app delivers high-fidelity audio training (masteran) leveraging a custom implementation of just_audio and audio_service for uninterrupted background playback. 

It features live bird competition discovery integrated with real-time Firestore synchronization, device geolocating for local event tracking, and deep-linking capabilities via app_links to drive viral user acquisition. Engineered with robust offline state management using SharedPreferences, secure OAuth2 authentications, and optimized data models to ensure seamless operation under weak cellular connectivity.
items.result: Successfully published on Google Play Store with functional hybrid monetization (AdMob + In-App Purchases) and active automated update integration.

items.title: Logis: Smart Logistics & Operational Management SaaS
items.shortDescription: High-performance logistics management platform. Featuring real-time operational tracking, automated documentation (PDF), and integrated secure payment processing.
items.description: A modern, scalable SaaS platform engineered with Next.js 16 and TypeScript to streamline logistics and operational workflows. The architecture leverages Firebase for real-time data synchronization and Midtrans for secure, automated transaction processing. It features sophisticated on-the-fly document generation (PDF/AutoTable), responsive UI components via Radix-UI and Tailwind CSS, and robust observability through Sentry integration. Built to handle complex business processes with high reliability, ensuring seamless performance across enterprise operations
items.result: Deployed as a robust SaaS tool, significantly reducing manual document processing time and enhancing operational visibility for logistics management.

items.title: Prolog: High-Performance Local-First Web Platform
items.shortDescription: A modern, offline-capable web application built with React 19 and Dexie. Features seamless cloud synchronization via Supabase and instant local storage capabilities.
items.description: Prolog is a sophisticated web application engineered for speed and reliability, utilizing the latest React 19 ecosystem. The platform implements a "local-first" architecture using Dexie.js for lightning-fast IndexedDB operations, ensuring critical functionality remains available even without an active internet connection. It features real-time cloud synchronization backed by Supabase for secure, scalable state management, and an integrated PDF generation engine for immediate reporting. Optimized as a PWA, Prolog delivers an app-like experience directly within the browser, balancing heavy local data processing with efficient cloud syncing.
items.result: Successfully deployed as a high-performance web platform, offering enterprise-grade offline reliability and seamless cross-device synchronization

items.title: The Rover: Integrated Property & Room Management System
items.shortDescription: Professional-grade property management platform. Features automated tenant booking, invoicing, maintenance tracking, and WhatsApp integration.
items.description: The Rover is a comprehensive, high-performance property and room management application engineered for operational excellence. Built with a full-stack TypeScript architecture using React 19, Hono, and Drizzle ORM, it provides a seamless experience for managing tenants, bookings, and billing cycles. The platform includes mission-critical integrations such as automated WhatsApp notifications (Kirimi.id), secure file storage via Cloudflare R2, and transactional email services (Resend). Designed for scalability and maintainability, it features built-in automated migration workflows, tRPC-based type-safe API communication, and comprehensive testing suites to ensure production-level reliability.
items.result: Deployed as an all-in-one property management hub, successfully automating complex billing, tenant communications, and maintenance tracking workflows

items.title: ZenBird: Premium Nature Sounds & Wellness
items.shortDescription: Premium audio-centric wellness app. Features 4-channel sound mixing, 3D spatial studio, and haptic-guided breathwork for sleep and productivity.
items.description: A sophisticated Flutter-based wellness application engineered for immersive audio experiences. Built with just_audio and custom audio_service implementations to support high-fidelity multi-channel mixing, allowing users to layer ambient soundscapes with granular volume control. Features a 3D Spatial Studio for psychoacoustic sound positioning, synchronized haptic-visual breathwork, and Pomodoro-based Deep Focus timers. Optimized with advanced caching mechanisms for seamless content delivery and a clean, subscription-free "lifetime" monetization model via Google Play Billing
items.result: Successfully launched with lifetime-access value proposition, resulting in high organic user retention and 5-star feedback on spatial audio quality.

items.title: MorphBid: Indonesia's #1 Reptile Auction Platform
items.shortDescription: The ultimate marketplace for reptile enthusiasts. Featuring secure real-time bidding, integrated payment gateways, and community-driven auction events.
items.description: A comprehensive, scalable mobile auction ecosystem designed for the Indonesian reptile community. Built with Flutter, the platform utilizes Firebase Firestore and Cloud Functions to deliver low-latency real-time bidding updates  . It integrates advanced image processing via Cloudinary for high-quality pet cataloging, secure user authentication through Google Sign-In, and a robust notification system powered by Firebase Messaging  . The architecture is optimized for performance, featuring secure in-app purchasing and geolocator-based event tracking for local auctions.
items.result: Successfully granted production access on Google Play, facilitating secure community auctions with high-performance real-time data handling
